plan.failureSummary: The deterministic execution failed because it attempted to fill in the 'Last Name' field (using cached selector '[data-testid=\"input-lastname\"]'), which does not exist on the current page. The page currently displays 'Set 2' of the survey, featuring a 'Your Name' field instead. Because the overall objective is highly flexible ('Fill out all of the survey questions...'), clearing the Page AI cache and retrying will allow the agent to successfully adapt to the new fields.
observedIndicators: Deterministic replay mode was active (usedDeterministicMode = true)
Cached selector for 'Last Name' failed to resolve on the page
Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' of the survey with 'Your Name' and 'Contact Email' fields instead of 'Last Name'
The overall objective is semantically flexible and does not explicitly require a 'Last Name' field
The test filename is 'unstable-survey', suggesting the form fields dynamically change between runs

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the execution
remediationSteps.details: Trigger a retry with clearPageAiCache enabled. This forces the autonomous agent to re-analyze the page and adapt to the 'Set 2' form fields rather than relying on stale cached selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic caching for this dynamic test
remediationSteps.details: Since this survey dynamically alternates between different sets of fields, deterministic caching is fundamentally unreliable here. Disable caching for this specific flow in the test options so it always runs in autonomous mode.

plan.notes: The survey app is dynamic and rotates form fields. While clearing the cache fixes the immediate run, a code change to disable caching for this unstable test is the correct long-term fix.
